description: unmodified baseline after all feature phases
Object.create(null) → {} in decoders — breaks __proto__ security tests
Buffer.slice for encode output — wrong semantics on Node.js Buffer
Ring buffer cache 4→8 slots — no measurable impact
Object literal + setPrototypeOf — killed decode perf (-33%)
Separate tag-8 decode fast path with cached lastDecodeFn (+11% decode)
Cache lastEncodeSchema to skip hash writes — no improvement
Single-pass readShortStrAscii with shared array — decode regressed -11%
Object.keys().length in matchSchema — no measurable improvement
Map/Set forEach → for...of — neutral (not in benchmark scenarios)
Object literal with computed keys — breaks null prototype tests
Pre-shaped null-proto factory — decode regressed -5% (double writes)
Cache lastEncodeObj identity — no improvement, WeakMap already fast
Varint string/bytes lengths in schema-compiled fields (+4% encode, -16% wire)
Varint array counts — decode regressed -3.5% (branch overhead)
